source_note: Dated Shellz plan/cart screenshots and public-pricing research snapshots. These are not a live price feed. Missing values remain null and must not be guessed.

hostinger-premium.regionCurrency: USD cart screenshot; checkout region not displayed
hostinger-premium.introLabel: $3.59/mo for 12 months after 10% coupon; $43.09 total today
hostinger-premium.renewalTerm: Renews after 12 months at $10.99/mo for 12 months
hostinger-premium.status: Shellz cart screenshots published: 12-month UROFF10 and BLOGWITHBP checks
hostinger-premium.notes: Domain name, domain privacy and taxes showed $0 in the captured 12-month cart. Screenshot does not verify speed, uptime or support.

bluehost-starter.regionCurrency: USD checkout with Qatar billing form; data center India, Mumbai
bluehost-starter.introLabel: 36-month Starter checkout captures showed $122.09 and $129.28 totals after hosting promo
bluehost-starter.couponLabel: Hosting promo applied automatically; no typed code visible in capture
bluehost-starter.renewalLabel: Renews at $359.64 for the next 36-month term ($9.99/mo)
bluehost-starter.status: Shellz Bluehost Starter checkout screenshots published: two 36-month cart captures with renewal note visible
bluehost-starter.threeYearCostNote: Uses the lower captured cart total; another captured promo state showed $129.28 for the same 36-month term.
bluehost-starter.notes: Domain name, Professional Email Trial and tax showed $0. Optional add-ons were visible and unchecked in the captured checkout. Screenshot does not verify speed, uptime or support.

hostgator-hatchling.regionCurrency: USD checkout screenshot; data center India, Mumbai

wpx-managed-wordpress.regionCurrency: USD checkout; account country field showed United States in captured cart
wpx-managed-wordpress.introLabel: SAVE79 reduced first monthly payment to $3.78 on the captured monthly Starter cart
wpx-managed-wordpress.introTerm: 1 month; WPX Starter monthly cart captured 2026-07-12
wpx-managed-wordpress.renewalLabel: Next monthly charge shown as $17.99 USD

wpx-managed-wordpress.status: Shellz WPX Starter monthly checkout screenshot published with SAVE79 applied and next monthly charge visible
wpx-managed-wordpress.threeYearCostNote: WPX monthly evidence is not a 3-year prepaid shared-hosting comparison; use exact monthly charges instead.
wpx-managed-wordpress.notes: SAVE79 applied to the monthly Starter cart in the Shellz test. It did not apply to the captured 1-year Starter cart. Screenshot does not verify speed, uptime or support.
